steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student explicitly wants to emphasize Sirius A's mass. The sentence must name Sirius A and make its mass the focal point.

steps.title: Match the goal to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice D accomplishes the goal by naming Sirius A and presenting its mass (2.063 solar masses) as the focal point, emphasizing that it's more massive than the Sun. Choices A, B, and C discuss solar masses generally, mention other stars, or omit Sirius A entirely. That matches choice D — D is correct.
